race.comment: Toughest race of the day. PINHOLE (3) imported stayer improving with racing. Closed strongly from back in the field with a respectable fourth to Tazima in a strong rating contest over 2000m at Randwick in BM88 grade. Will be winding up strongly with Rawiller aboard. CASUAL CONNECTION (1) back in grade and progressed nicely when he loomed strongly for a narrow second over 2400m at Randwick in BM78 grade. Grima sticks and he has genuine each-way claims. SO SUAVE (8) improved sharply in the heavy conditions with a commanding victory as fav over 2110m at Warwick Farm in BM72 class. Bred to get the trip and likely to play a leading role. CENTENARIO (4) shouldered the 60kg with a fighting on-pace fourth second-up in the heavy going over 2110m at Warwick Farm. Winning rider hops back aboard and placed at this trip in a solid contest last time in.
